{{Quote|Your next task is to secure a landing zone for us at Birgis. Here's the reconnaissance data we've just received, in a format that you can use. We could simply destroy the surface from orbit, because the planet will be reshaped and reengineered to our requirements anyway, but we wish to take the inhabitants alive to work for us.|Yuuzhan Vong executor Nom Anor informs Boba Fett of his species' plans for Birgis|<ref name="BoFettPracMan" />}}
'''Birgis''' was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It lay in the path of the [[extragalactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Description==
Birgis was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="BoFettPracMan" /> in the [[Birgis system/Legends|Birgis system]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> Located in the [[Dalonbian sector/Legends|Dalonbian sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> of the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]], it was situated between the [[Seline system/Legends|Seline]] and [[MZX33291 system|Bimmiel]] [[Star system/Legends|systems]] on the [[Veragi Trade Route/Legends|Veragi Trade Route]].<ref name="TEA" /> Its surface featured [[Grass/Legends|grass]].<ref name="BoFettPracMan" />

==History==
In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], Birgis was a member state of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. During a meeting between [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|leader]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|executor]] [[Nom Anor]], Anor charged Fett with laying the groundwork for an [[Battle of Birgis|attack]] on Birgis. The [[extragalactic]] [[Alien/Legends|alien]] Anor outlined his [[Species/Legends|species]]' plans for [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and specifically for Birgis; they would [[Terraforming/Legends|terraform]] the planet and take its population as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]]. Promised safety for the [[Mandalore sector/Legends|Mandalore sector]] if [[Gender/Legends|he]] complied, Fett planned to use the upcoming assault as cover for ferrying [[Intelligence/Legends|intelligence]] on the Yuuzhan Vong to the New Republic.<ref name="BoFettPracMan" />

One week after the [[Battle of Helska IV|opening battle]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Birgis was serving as a fallback point for displaced [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic fleet]] elements that had escaped the Yuuzhan Vong advance and regrouped onsite. Fett and the [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]] landed on Birgis and went ahead of the Yuuzhan Vong landing force to run interference at a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] housing a New Republic contingent. Though Fett and his troops carried out the attack as ordered, they were able to recruit a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to get pertinent information and Yuuzhan Vong materials gathered by the Mandalorians to [[New Republic High Command/Legends|New Republic High Command]]. The Mandalorians were forced to withdraw as the Yuuzhan Vong landing force arrived, slaughtering the spaceport's defenders to a man.<ref name="BoFettPracMan" />

Birgis fell under the control of the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]], and remained a member state until the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar|defeat]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Locations==
Birgis was home to several [[City/Legends|cities]] spread across the planet, at least five of which were situated on the northern hemisphere, and a spaceport that served both [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|military]] and civilian [[Starship/Legends|vessels]].<ref name="BoFettPracMan" />

==Behind the scenes==
Birgis first appeared in [[Karen Traviss]]' [[2006]] [[eBook]] ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]''.<ref name="BoFettPracMan" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed Birgis to the grid co-ordinates M-3.<ref name="TEA" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' {{1st}}
